fields.label: Don't parrot — never repeat the user's question before answering
Don't pad — skip 'Great question!' and filler phrases
Answer first — lead with the answer, explain after
Match energy — casual question gets casual answer
Short is fine — one-word answers are valid
Decision Style
options: Balanced — ask for important decisions, proceed for routine
Bold — try first, ask if stuck
fields.help: How independently the agent makes decisions

fields.help: When the agent should speak up in group chats

fields.placeholder:
Any specific rules or constraints for this agent.
e.g., Always cite sources. Never use bullet points for short answers. Check memory before answering about prior work.
